title: MTG - 250+ Card Collection Bundle | 20 Rares + 60 Uncommons | Storage Box
description: Description MTG 250+ Card Collection Box + Storage Box Important Note: Cards shown in photos are for display purposes only and are not guaranteed to be included in the lot. Looking to start your Magic: The Gathering journey or expand your collection? This carefully assembled collection offers a fantastic mix of cards for new players, casual players, Commander enthusiasts, and collectors looking to add variety to their collection. What's Included 250+ Magic: The Gathering Cards Guaranteed: 20 Rares 60 Uncommons 20 Foil / Special Border Cards Storage Box Included Special Border Cards may include: Showcase Cards Borderless Cards Extended Art Cards Retro Frame Cards Promo Cards Traditional Foil Cards Other special printings Additional cards will consist primarily of commons from a variety of Magic sets.
